scripts.update:all: npm run update:backend && npm run update:frontend
scripts.build:ts6: npm run build:ts6 --workspace=backend && npm run build:ts6 --workspace=frontend
scripts.build:ts7: npm run build:ts7 --workspace=backend && npm run build:ts7 --workspace=frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ts6 && npm run typecheck:ts7
scripts.typecheck:ts6: tsc6 -p backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc6 -b frontend/tsconfig.json --pretty false && tsc6 -p backend/tsconfig.test.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc6 -p frontend/cypress/tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.typecheck:ts6:stable: tsc6 -p backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false --stableTypeOrdering && tsc6 -p frontend/tsconfig.app.json --pretty false --stableTypeOrdering && tsc6 -p frontend/tsconfig.node.json --pretty false --stableTypeOrdering && tsc6 -p backend/tsconfig.test.json --noEmit --pretty false --stableTypeOrdering && tsc6 -p frontend/cypress/tsconfig.json --pretty false --stableTypeOrdering
scripts.typecheck:ts7: tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -b frontend/tsconfig.json --pretty false && tsc -p backend/tsconfig.test.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p frontend/cypress/tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.dev: node scripts/pick-port.mjs && concurrently -n "Backend,TrendingWorker,ProfileWorker,NewFeedWorker,Frontend" "npm run start-backend" "npm run start-trending-worker" "npm run start-profile-sync-worker" "npm run start-newFeed-worker" "npm run start-frontend"
